name: University of Lagos
notes: Online CBT — 50 questions, 30 minutes. Covers Use of English and 2 subject areas. Result is based on 50% JAMB + 50% O'Level grades.

name: University of Ibadan
notes: Written/CBT Post-UTME varies by faculty. Check the UI portal for your faculty's specific format and subject areas.

name: Obafemi Awolowo University
notes: Online CBT Post-UTME — 40 questions, 30 minutes. Covers English and relevant subject areas. Score combined with JAMB at 50/50.

name: University of Nigeria Nsukka
notes: Online Post-UTME screening — CBT format. Covers English and 2 subjects relevant to your course of study.

name: Ahmadu Bello University
notes: CBT Post-UTME — 60 questions across English and relevant subjects. JAMB and O'Level weighted equally.

name: University of Benin
notes: CBT Post-UTME — covers Use of English and subject areas. Results combined at 50/50 with JAMB score.

name: Lagos State University
notes: Online Post-UTME screening — 40 questions. JAMB weighted at 40%, O'Level at 60%. Score your best in O'Level subjects.

name: Covenant University
notes: Post-UTME CBT + personality assessment. Admission is highly competitive. Strong O'Level performance is essential.

name: Federal University of Technology Akure
notes: CBT Post-UTME focused on Science and Technology subjects. Only science-based courses offered.

name: University of Port Harcourt
notes: Computer-based Post-UTME screening. Covers English and 2 relevant subjects. Aggregate calculated at 50/50.
